series_metadata.series_description: Letters and other documentation submitted to initiate/plan/complete all phases of the jail construction/renovation planning and approval process. May include staffing analysis, policies and procedures, financial data (funding/projected operational costs), construction specifications, site visit forms, letters/memos detailing construction process. DOES NOT INCLUDE: Phase approval letters and Phase 3 Final approved blueprints.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Policies, procedures and blueprints prior to Final Phase 3 can be destroyed after One (1) year of the facility opening. Retain all other construction documentation/correspondence for Five (5) years after the facility opens in individual jail files at Regional and Central Office location, then destroy., Paper: Shred
